overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a dimly lit medieval castle interior illuminated by red candlelight, then exiting through large wooden doors into a moonlit castle courtyard with stone fortifications and cobblestone paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval castle interior corridor with stone arches and burning braziers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit stone corridor, passing wooden scaffolding and burning braziers emitting red-orange light

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the corridor passage
metal brazier burning with red-orange flames providing warm lighting
wooden support structures and platforms along the stone walls
thick stone pillar supporting the vaulted ceiling
heavy wooden double doors at the end of the corridor leading outside

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view of a white-haired character with two swords walking through a candlelit medieval castle interior. The environment features stone arches, columns, and burning braziers casting warm red light against the dark stone walls. Wooden scaffolding structures line the corridor as the character approaches a large wooden door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval castle courtyard at night with stone fortifications and towers

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and steps from the candlelit interior into the moonlit castle courtyard
character ascends a set of stone stairs while continuing to explore the courtyard

agents.ego_description: emerging from the castle and exploring the moonlit courtyard, walking along cobblestone paths, turning left, and ascending stone stairs

entered.detail: tall stone fortification walls surrounding the castle courtyard
cylindrical stone tower with crenellations rising above the walls
dark blue night sky with visible clouds and flying birds
tall pine tree growing within the castle grounds
weathered stone steps leading up to a higher level of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dark castle interior through large wooden doors into a vast moonlit courtyard. The environment shifts from warm red artificial lighting to cool blue natural moonlight. The scene features medieval stone walls, a round tower, wooden scaffolding, and cobblestone paths. The character explores the open area, ascending stone stairs while the camera reveals the expansive night sky and distant castle fortifications.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medieval castle interior that leads toward a grand exit. It begins by trailing a white-haired character with two swords as he walks through a corridor of dark stone walls and arches. As he advances, the camera passes burning braziers and wooden scaffolding that cast a warm red glow across the columns. The scene then narrows its focus on the path ahead before finally approaching a set of large wooden doors at the far end of the hall.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a dimly lit castle interior into a vast, moonlit courtyard. It begins by passing through large wooden doors, where the warm red glow of artificial lighting abruptly shifts to the cool blue tones of natural moonlight. As the character enters the open air, the scene expands to reveal medieval stone walls, a round tower, and wooden scaffolding lining the cobblestone paths. The camera then follows the character ascending stone stairs, gradually tilting upward to uncover the expansive night sky and the distant silhouette of castle fortifications.
